---
title: 'The Wellness Practices That Helped Me Lose Over 100 Pounds â€” And Keep Them Off'
date: '2019-06-06T08:01:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8095442746533625925'
blogger_filename: '/2019/06/the-wellness-practices-that-helped-me.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<div class="WordSection1">
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/the-best-advice-to-lose-weight-and-keep-it-off-for-life">https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/the-best-advice-to-lose-weight-and-keep-it-off-for-life</a><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<h1 style="background: white;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">The Wellness Practices That Helped Me Lose Over 100 Pounds â€” And Keep Them Off<o:p></o:p></span></h1>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #767676; font-size: 9.0pt;">April 7, 2019 â€” 10:44 AM <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span class="share-on3"><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 13.5pt;">Share on:</span></span><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 13.5pt;"> <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span class="share-on3"><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 13.5pt;">Share on:</span></span><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 13.5pt;"> <a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/the-best-advice-to-lose-weight-and-keep-it-off-for-life"> <span style="background: white;">Created with Sketch. </span></a><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/the-best-advice-to-lose-weight-and-keep-it-off-for-life"><span style="background: white;">Created with Sketch. </span></a><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/the-best-advice-to-lose-weight-and-keep-it-off-for-life"><span style="background: white;">Created with Sketch. </span></a><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/the-best-advice-to-lose-weight-and-keep-it-off-for-life"><span style="background: white;">Created with Sketch. </span></a><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/the-best-advice-to-lose-weight-and-keep-it-off-for-life"><span style="background: white;">Created with Sketch. </span></a><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/the-best-advice-to-lose-weight-and-keep-it-off-for-life"><span style="background: white;">Created with Sketch. </span></a><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/the-best-advice-to-lose-weight-and-keep-it-off-for-life"><span style="background: white;">Created with Sketch. </span></a><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/the-best-advice-to-lose-weight-and-keep-it-off-for-life"><span style="background: white;">Created with Sketch. </span></a><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/the-best-advice-to-lose-weight-and-keep-it-off-for-life"><span style="background: white;">Created with Sketch. </span></a><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/the-best-advice-to-lose-weight-and-keep-it-off-for-life"><span style="background: white;">Created with Sketch. </span></a><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">Not long ago, I was running between meetings. I was late but I didn't want to miss lunch. Lucky for me, there was a Sweetgreen around the corner. So I ran in, grabbed a salad, and ran out as the  Uber pulled up.</span><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 12.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">"I'm in a rush to get to my next meeting," I said. "Is it OK to eat in the back?" "Yeah, sure," he said. "No problem. What do you do?" I hesitated for a moment because he looked to be about 400  pounds. I could never be sure how someone that size was going to respond.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">"I started a company," I said, "to help people do what I did. I lost 130 pounds."<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">"One hundred and thirty pounds!" he said. "I've been trying to lose weight all my life. I just can't do it. Every time I lose 30 or 40, the weight just comes back."<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">"It's not your fault," I said. "Ninety-five percent of dieters gain the weight back. That just makes you normal."<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">"I've come to accept the fact that this is my reality. But is there something I can do?" he asked.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">Here's what I told him. These 12 things are what helped me lose 130 pounds and keep the weight off in the long term:<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white; margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">1. Don't restrict yourself. <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">Restricting yourself doesn't work. Adding healthy items to your regular regimen will start to shift your patterns. The restriction only makes you want more of the foods you aren't allowing yourself  to have. Not only that, but research has shown that extreme diets can <a href="https://psycnet.apa.org/doiLanding?doi=10.1037/a0013644" target="_blank"> <span style="color: blue;">open the door</span></a> to behaviors that cause eating disorders.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white; margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">2. Don't let your brain trick you. <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">It may be making you think you're hungry when you're really thirsty. I drank half my weight in ounces of water every day. It kept me feeling full. My brain felt like it was operating sharperâ€”and  it stopped my cravings. Drinking water also <a href="https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3984246/pdf/pone.0094754.pdf" target="_blank"> <span style="color: blue;">boosts your metabolism</span></a> and clears your body of waste.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; text-align: center;">
<i><span lang="EN" style="color: #767676; font-size: 9.0pt;">Article continues below<o:p></o:p></span></i></div>
<h2 style="background: white; margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">3. Make sure you're doing this for yourself. <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">Losing weight for other people won't work in the long term. When you lose weight to fit into your clothes to look good for somebody else, it's short-lived. When you do it as an act of self-love  because you deserve it, you're tapping into a deeper desire. If you know "why" you are committed, you will stay true to your commitment when you feel challenged. Self-efficacy, specifically the belief that you have the ability to achieve your weight loss goal,  has <a href="https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1111/j.1467-789X.2005.00170.x" target="_blank"> <span style="color: blue;">also been linked</span></a> with successful weight loss.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white; margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">4. No extreme workouts. <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">Extreme workouts are not sustainable. In order to make changes over a long time, you have to establish patterns that you can stick with. Begin with a short walk and don't push yourself to do too  much. Don't put your body under too much stress by taking on too much too soon. Little by little, a little adds up to a lot. Research shows that the more you are satisfied with your workout, the <a href="https://academic.oup.com/her/article/12/3/363/683138" target="_blank"><span style="color: blue;">more likely</span></a> it will become a habit.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white; margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">5. Get out into nature. <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">Put your feet in the grass. Get under the sun. Step in the water. Breathe fresh air. Light a fire. Anything that brings you back to nature<a href="https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fpsyg.2014.01178/full" target="_blank"><span style="color: blue;">&nbsp;relaxes  your mind</span></a> and your body. â€‹That's going to help you connect with your body. When you feel a deep connection, you're less likely to (go out and) overeat.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; text-align: center;">
<i><span lang="EN" style="color: #767676; font-size: 9.0pt;">Article continues below<o:p></o:p></span></i></div>
<h3 style="background: white;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">Related Class<o:p></o:p></span></h3>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 13.5pt;"><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/classes/aim-true-21-day-journey?mbg_p=a&amp;mbg_ref=body&amp;mbg_a=37682&amp;mbg_ifs=0" target="_blank"><span lang="EN-US" style="font-family: &quot;calibri&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 11.0pt; text-decoration: none;"><!--[if gte vml 1]><v:shapetype id="_x0000_t75" coordsize="21600,21600" o:spt="75" o:preferrelative="t" path="m@4@5l@4@11@9@11@9@5xe" filled="f" stroked="f"> <v:stroke joinstyle="miter" /> <v:formulas> <v:f eqn="if lineDrawn pixelLineWidth 0" /> <v:f eqn="sum @0 1 0" /> <v:f eqn="sum 0 0 @1" /> <v:f eqn="prod @2 1 2" /> <v:f eqn="prod @3 21600 pixelWidth" /> <v:f eqn="prod @3 21600 pixelHeight" /> <v:f eqn="sum @0 0 1" /> <v:f eqn="prod @6 1 2" /> <v:f eqn="prod @7 21600 pixelWidth" /> <v:f eqn="sum @8 21600 0" /> <v:f eqn="prod @7 21600 pixelHeight" /> <v:f eqn="sum @10 21600 0" /> </v:formulas> <v:path o:extrusionok="f" gradientshapeok="t" o:connecttype="rect" /> <o:lock v:ext="edit" aspectratio="t" /> </v:shapetype><v:shape id="Rectangle_x0020_4" o:spid="_x0000_s1027" type="#_x0000_t75" alt="Aim True: A 21-Day Journey" href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/classes/aim-true-21-day-journey?mbg_p=a&mbg_ref=body&mbg_a=37682&mbg_ifs=0" target=""_blank"" style='width:24pt;height:24pt;visibility:visible;mso-left-percent:-10001;mso-top-percent:-10001;mso-position-horizontal:absolute;mso-position-horizontal-relative:char;mso-position-vertical:absolute;mso-position-vertical-relative:line;mso-left-percent:-10001;mso-top-percent:-10001' o:button="t"> <v:fill o:detectmouseclick="t" /> <w:wrap type="none"/> <w:anchorlock/> </v:shape><![endif]-->&lt;![if !vml]&gt;<span style="mso-ignore: vglayout;"></span></span></a><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/classes/aim-true-21-day-journey?mbg_p=a&amp;mbg_ref=body&amp;mbg_a=37682&amp;mbg_ifs=0" target="&quot;_blank&quot;"></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-763169-badb245ba9be.png"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6698914453206869058" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-763169-873d98127024.png" /></a></span>&lt;![endif]&gt;</div>
</div>
<span lang="EN-US" style="color: blue; text-decoration: none;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image002-765383-cb951162c97f.jpg"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6698914459958318386" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image002-765383-ac212ee9ee6b.jpg" /></a></span>&lt;img  alt="Aim True: A 21-Day Journey" title="Aim True: A 21-Day Journey" class="" src="/images/imported/mindbodygreen-res-cloudinary-com/aim-true-a-21-day-journey-f828c80dd780.png"&gt; <o:p></o:p> <br />
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 13.5pt;"><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/classes/aim-true-21-day-journey?mbg_p=a&amp;mbg_ref=body&amp;mbg_a=37682&amp;mbg_ifs=0" target="_blank"><span class="cardprice2"><span style="color: blue; text-decoration: none;">$39.99</span></span> </a><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;"><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/classes/aim-true-21-day-journey?mbg_p=a&amp;mbg_ref=body&amp;mbg_a=37682&amp;mbg_ifs=0" target="_blank">Aim True: A 21-Day Journey</a><o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span class="cardcontent-label3"><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 13.5pt;">With Kathryn Budig</span></span><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 13.5pt;"> <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white; margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">6. Eat mindfully. <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">If you eat slowly and mindfully in a relaxed state, your body interprets the food differently than when you're under stress. When your body feels like something is wrong, it goes into survival mode.  When it's in survival mode, it begins to store the food. When you are relaxed, the food is processed in a normal way. Take three deep breaths before you eat, sit down, and chew your food slowly. One way in which mindfulness practices may be helpful is through <a href="https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1471015314000191" target="_blank"> <span style="color: blue;">a reduction in disordered eating</span></a>, including emotional eating.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white; margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">7. Deal with your emotional traumas. <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">If you don't deal with your emotional traumas, nothing will really change over the long term. Research supports a <a href="https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0031938409002972" target="_blank"> <span style="color: blue;">link between trauma and obesity</span></a>. Where do you start? Forgive yourself. Meditate. See a therapist. Take a step in the right direction to deal with your emotional traumas. Forgiving and accepting yourself is a great way to  start.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white; margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">8. Be accountable. <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">Find somebody who wants to lose weight, and then hold each other accountable. Make healthier friends. Who you're around is who you become. If you go to a yoga studio and start hanging around with  people doing yoga, you're going to be around people making healthier choices. Simply being around healthier people will <a href="https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1111/j.1467-789X.2005.00170.x" target="_blank"> <span style="color: blue;">lead to healthier choices</span></a>.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; text-align: center;">
<i><span lang="EN" style="color: #767676; font-size: 9.0pt;">Article continues below<o:p></o:p></span></i></div>
<h2 style="background: white; margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">9. Track what you eat. <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">When you use an app, you're able to record what you eat and look back at it. Don't let shame or guilt stop you from being truthful. Record everything. That brings awareness. There's an old saying: </span><em><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">What gets measured, gets improved.</span></em><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white; margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">10. Journal every day. <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">Become aware of your emotions, your patterns, your triggers. Let your own mistakes teach you. Even if you never look back at what you wroteâ€”even if you can't read your handwriting!â€”you will have  processed your feelings, emotions, and thoughts. Expressive writing <a href="https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/advances-in-psychiatric-treatment/article/emotional-and-physical-health-benefits-of-expressive-writing/ED2976A61F5DE56B46F07A1CE9EA9F9F" target="_blank"> <span style="color: blue;">has been linked</span></a> to more optimal mental health, through better mood and psychological well-being, as well as better physical health, including lower blood pressure and greater immune system functioning.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<h2 style="background: white; margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">11. Visualize the new you. <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">I cropped a photo of my head on an ideal body so I could start to see what it feels like to be a healthier version of myself. Doing this will help your brain see you in a new way. Research shows  your brain <a href="https://people.ucalgary.ca/~rmlevy/Publications/Sorrentino_Levy_Katz_Peng_IJCSS-Volume4_1_2005.pdf" target="_blank"> <span style="color: blue;">doesn't distinguish</span></a> fiction from reality. Your brain will move toward your goals as you visualize them. Dream where you want to be as if you already are there.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; text-align: center;">
<i><span lang="EN" style="color: #767676; font-size: 9.0pt;">Article continues below<o:p></o:p></span></i></div>
<h2 style="background: white; margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">12. Be kind and gentle to yourself. <o:p></o:p></span></h2>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">Treat yourself with patience and compassion. One day you're going to realize the fat version of you is the hero, not the skinny version. It's the heavy person in the photo who had the courage to  get through the obstacles. Don't resent the heavy person when you are that person. Love that heavy person. Because when you get to the finish line, it's still going to be the same you.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">There was a lot more to talk about, but I was glad to have given him some basics by the time we reached my destination. I recommended that he read a book that opened my eyes to a lot of these lessons: <a href="https://www.amazon.com/Gabriel-Method-Revolutionary-DIET-FREE-Transform/dp/1582702187/ref=as_li_qf_sp_asin_il_tl?tag=mind0a3-20" target="_blank"> <em><span style="color: blue;">The Gabriel Method</span></em></a> by John Gabriel. I told him how this book had really affected my life when I was heavy.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">"Make you a deal," I said. "Read the book and I'll help you." He typed the title into his phone and turned around with a big smile on his face, then he stuck out his hand.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin-bottom: 19.45pt;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;">I wish every lunch would feel that good.<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div style="background: white;">
<em><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222;">Ready to learn more about how to unlock the power of food to heal your body, prevent disease &amp; achieve optimal health? Register now for our <a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/webinars/f5836ea444?mbg_ifs=0&amp;mbg_p=a&amp;mbg_ref=body-fnp&amp;mbg_a=37682" id="kelly-leveque-optimal-health-click" target="_blank"> <span style="font-family: Maax-Medium-Italic;">FREE Functional Nutrition Webinar with Kelly LeVeque.</span></a></span></em><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-family: Maax-Regular;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 13.5pt;"><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/tag/empowerment?mbg_p=a&amp;mbg_ref=tags&amp;mbg_a=37682&amp;mbg_ifs=0"><span style="font-size: 9.0pt; letter-spacing: 1.5pt; text-transform: uppercase;">#empowerment</span></a> <a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/tag/journaling?mbg_p=a&amp;mbg_ref=tags&amp;mbg_a=37682&amp;mbg_ifs=0"> <span style="font-size: 9.0pt; letter-spacing: 1.5pt; text-transform: uppercase;">#journaling</span></a> <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 13.5pt;"><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/wc/mordechai-wiener?mbg_p=a&amp;mbg_ref=bottombio&amp;mbg_a=37682&amp;mbg_ifs=0"><span lang="EN-US" style="font-family: &quot;calibri&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 11.0pt; text-decoration: none;"><!--[if gte vml 1]><v:shape id="Rectangle_x0020_2" o:spid="_x0000_s1026" type="#_x0000_t75" alt="Mordechai Wiener" href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/wc/mordechai-wiener?mbg_p=a&mbg_ref=bottombio&mbg_a=37682&mbg_ifs=0" style='width:24pt;height:24pt;visibility:visible;mso-left-percent:-10001;mso-top-percent:-10001;mso-position-horizontal:absolute;mso-position-horizontal-relative:char;mso-position-vertical:absolute;mso-position-vertical-relative:line;mso-left-percent:-10001;mso-top-percent:-10001' o:button="t"> <v:fill o:detectmouseclick="t" /> <w:wrap type="none"/> <w:anchorlock/> </v:shape><![endif]-->&lt;![if !vml]&gt;<span style="mso-ignore: vglayout;"></span></span></a><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/wc/mordechai-wiener?mbg_p=a&amp;mbg_ref=bottombio&amp;mbg_a=37682&amp;mbg_ifs=0"></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-763169-badb245ba9be.png"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6698914453206869058" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-763169-873d98127024.png" /></a></span>&lt;![endif]&gt;</div>
<span lang="EN-US" style="color: blue; text-decoration: none;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image003-767581-0fdcd896c0cd.jpg"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6698914467218941282" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image003-767581-de5b14f84c6e.jpg" /></a></span>&lt;img  alt="Mordechai Wiener" title="Mordechai Wiener" class="article-author-bio__image" src="/images/imported/mindbodygreen-res-cloudinary-com/mordechai-wiener-ef17288ea950.png"&gt; <o:p></o:p> <br />
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span class="editor-infotext-item5"><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 11.5pt;"><a href="https://www.mindbodygreen.com/wc/mordechai-wiener?mbg_p=a&amp;mbg_ref=bottombio&amp;mbg_a=37682&amp;mbg_ifs=0">Mordechai Wiener</a></span></span><span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 13.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;">
<span lang="EN" style="color: #222222; font-size: 9.0pt;">Mordechai Wiener is a dedicated health advocate. Since the age of 8 years old, he's <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<b><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;">Darrell Wolfe<o:p></o:p></span></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<b><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">Triage Associate | Account Protection <o:p></o:p></span></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">Alliance Data </span><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">751 W Hanley, Coeur d'Alene, ID 83815<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="http://www.knowmoresellmore.com/"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">knowmoresellmore.com</span></a><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">  | </span><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/2973795?trk=tyah"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">LinkedIn </span></a><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">| </span><a href="https://www.facebook.com/KnowMoreSellMore"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">Facebook</span></a><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"> </span><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">| </span><a href="https://twitter.com/know_sellmore"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">Twitter</span></a><span style="font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;"> <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<br clear="both" />
______________________________________________________________________<br />
The information contained in this e-mail message and any attachments may be privileged and confidential. If the reader of this message is not the intended recipient or an agent responsible for delivering it to the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any review, dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please notify the sender immediately by replying to this e-mail and delete the message and any attachments from your computer.<br />
______________________________________________________________________
